title: Bangkok Zest Luxury Scented Candle Gift - Hand-Poured in England - Lemongrass & Ginger Aroma - Up to 40 Hours Burn Time
features: INSPIRED BY THE VIBRANCY OF BANGKOK: Capture the energy of Thailand’s bustling capital with this refreshing and uplifting candle, infused with exotic lemongrass and ginger.
HAND-POURED EXCELLENCE: Made in England with pure rapeseed and coconut wax, this candle delivers a smooth, clean burn for up to 40 hours of invigorating fragrance.
ZESTY, REVITALISING SCENT: A lively blend of lemongrass and ginger creates a refreshing aroma that energises the mind and brightens any room.
ITALIAN GLASS DESIGN: Encased in a sleek, Italian-crafted clear glass container, this candle brings a touch of elegance to your home while exuding vibrant energy.
VEGAN & CRUELTY-FREE: Crafted with a cotton wick and free from animal testing and parabens, this candle is a mindful choice for luxurious and conscious living.
